data.title: Festi hf.: Results of the Annual General Meeting 5 March 2026
data.description: Today, Festi hf. conducted its Annual General Meeting on Thursday, 5 March 2026. The meeting outcomes are as follows: all necessary resolutions were passed, including the approval of the financial statements and the appointment of new board members. Key figures from the meeting show a high level of shareholder participation with a significant majority in favor of all proposals presented. This demonstrates strong confidence in the company's direction and leadership.

data.title: Bitcoin Up 12% In 1 Week, Beats Gold For First Time In Months As ETFs Pour In $800 Million
data.description: In a surprising turn of events, Bitcoin has outperformed gold for the first time in months, soaring by 12% since Friday. On the contrary, gold has experienced a 2% decline during the same period. Investors have demonstrated their bullish sentiments towards Bitcoin by injecting nearly $700 million into U.S. Bitcoin ETFs throughout March. This marks a significant reversal from previous trends, where gold was continuously achieving record-breaking prices while Bitcoin was plunging by over 40% since its peak of $126,000 in October. The current shift underscores the evolving dynamics of safe havens in the financial market. Bitcoin showcased its stability compared to other assets during the initial Iran selloff. As of Thursday, there has been a positive rebound in stocks, with Korea's Kospi index soaring by 11% and Japan's Nikkei 225 rising by 4.2%. OKX SG CEO, Gracie Lin, provided insights into the liquidity dynamics, explaining to Bloomberg that amid macro uncertainty and rising conflicts in the Middle East, markets are pricing in expectations of more accommodative financial conditions. Consequently, when liquidity expectations change, Bitcoin typically experiences a disproportionate response.

data.title: Cormedix Earnings Review: Q4 Summary
data.description: On Thursday, March 5, 2026, Cormedix (NASDAQ: CRMD) disclosed its Q4 earnings at 07:30 AM. The earnings report revealed that Cormedix fell short of projected earnings by -26.51%, presenting an EPS of $0.61 as opposed to the estimated $0.83. Notably, revenue surged by $97.39 million compared to the previous year. In examining past earnings, Cormedix missed the EPS forecast by $0.0. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Qualinx to Showcase World’s Most Power-Efficient and Only Reconfigurable GNSS Chip and Developer Evaluation Kit at Embedded World 2026
data.description: In Delft, Netherlands, Qualinx is set to present at Embedded World 2026 its pioneering GNSS chip and Developer Evaluation Kit, claiming it as the most power-efficient globally. This offering stands out as the sole reconfigurable option in the market, boasting unparalleled energy-saving capabilities. This showcase aims to highlight its groundbreaking features and advancements in the field.

data.title: Will the Treasury markets experience volatility?
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.5%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. Analysts attribute this rise to the ongoing economic challenges and job market instability caused by the global pandemic. The number of unemployed individuals now stands at 2.4 million, with a notable rise in the youth unemployment rate, which currently sits at 15%. As a result, policymakers are under pressure to implement measures to stimulate job creation and support those who have lost their jobs during this difficult period.

data.title: New Data from National Sleep Foundation Show Nearly Half of U.S. Children Don't Get Enough Sleep
data.description: A recent study from the National Sleep Foundation revealed that almost 50% of children in the United States are not obtaining sufficient sleep, impacting their family's sleep quality and overall well-being. The research underscores the importance of addressing sleep deprivation in children for the health of the entire family. This data, released on March 5, 2026, serves as a reminder of the critical role sleep plays in maintaining overall health and highlights the need for interventions to improve children's sleep habits.

data.title: Tamr Reports Strong FY26 Growth, Powering Enterprise AI with Connected, Trusted Data
data.description: Tamr, a company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, experienced a significant increase in their direct Software as a Service (SaaS) revenue, which more than doubled year-over-year. This growth was driven by the rising number of organizations seeking Tamr's services for master data management to support successful AI initiatives and improve business operations. The company's success underscores the increasing importance of reliable data foundations in today's business landscape.

data.title: SharpenCX Releases 2026 Buyer's Guide to Secure Pay-by-Phone Payment Capture
data.description: A new solution has been introduced to tackle the increasing compliance and architecture deficiencies in voice-based payment processing within utilities, healthcare, and financial services. Released on March 5, 2026, in Indianapolis, SharpenCX is the innovative cloud contact center platform specifically designed for AI-driven voice automation. This development aims to enhance security and efficiency in handling transactions. This update is crucial for various industries, with a focus on improving the overall process in an ever-evolving landscape.

data.title: TransUnion Advances AI Driven Credit Intelligence with Google Cloud
data.description: The merging of Google’s Gemini models with TransUnion’s specialized analytic data resources and extensive financial services knowledge has facilitated swift, targeted advancements through a fresh Analytics Orchestrator Agent. This integration combines diverse strengths to foster innovation, with a focus on specific sectors, enabling expedited progress in the analytics realm.
